name: Team Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: Hagerty’s Latest Op-Ed In Support Of The Walking Horse Industry
body:
Peter,Today, Bill Hagerty released his latest op-ed in the [_Shelbyville Times-Gazette_](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-r/) about the importance of protecting the Walking Horse industry in Shelbyville, supporting our state's agriculture industry and stimulating our economy. The walking horse industry plays a vital role in Tennessee's economy. Having the center of the industry here in Shelbyville means that it provides a huge boost to our state's economy. Beyond that, the industry contributes billions of dollars to the national economy and supports thousands of American jobs. To that end, we must continue to sustain this important industry while ensuring the right protections are in place to keep horses free from harm.In the Senate, Bill will work alongside Senator Marsha Blackburn and President Donald Trump to support and protect our walking horse industry, create more advantageous trade deals for American farmers and bring our supply chains to the U.S. from China. [**READ THE OP-ED**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-j/)** | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-puksyd-fuutjhhtj-u/)

name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: quick question for Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It's critical that we make sure we get the most up-to-date response from you on your voting plans for this fall. |
---
Peter,

The opportunity that we've been waiting for since November 9th, 2016, is nearly here: the ability to vote Donald Trump out of office and get our country back on track.

Early voting begins _this month,_ and we're not taking a single vote for granted. In 2016, Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin were all decided by less than 50,000 votes each.

So it's critical that we make sure we get the most up-to-date response from you on your voting plans for this fall.

**And it doesn't look like you've answered one of these polls before, so we're really hoping we can get a response from you and lock in your support.**

[Peter, please make sure to get your response in here »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f4/1cd0ac28/15a716dd7/35703f27/1070864879/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/september-vote-for-joe-and-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.09.02_B3_septvotepoll_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.09.02_B3_septvotepoll_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS") __| **BIDEN-HARRIS HQ SEPTEMBER TRACKING POLL**
---
__| __ **Supporter:** Peter Willis
**State:** Pennsylvania
**Responses Needed Before Midnight:** 5,000
**Your September Poll Response:** Pending

**Peter, do you plan to vote for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris this fall in Pennsylvania?**

| | [YES >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b1f4/1cd0ac28/15a716dd7/35703f27/1070864879/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/september-vote-for-joe-and-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.09.02_B3_septvotepoll_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.09.02_B3_septvotepoll_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopen-ns_RS")

clean_body: It's critical that we make sure we get the most up-to-date response from you on your voting plans for this fall. | Peter, The opportunity that we've been waiting for since November 9th, 2016, is nearly here: the ability to vote Donald Trump out of office and get our country back on track. Early voting begins this month, and we're not taking a single vote for granted. In 2016, Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin were all decided by less than 50,000 votes each. So it's critical that we make sure we get the most up-to-date response from you on your voting plans for this fall. And it doesn't look like you've answered one of these polls before, so we're really hoping we can get a response from you and lock in your support. body:
58 Days until Election Day! |
---
Peter, The work we do leading up to Election Day will determine whether we win the battle for the soul of our nation. The only way we will defeat Donald Trump is by coming together as a country to organize and win. And we can't do this without you. [There's a lot of exciting things happening on the campaign, and we're not taking our foot off the gas. Will you commit to joining one of the virtual events in your community?](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.06_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.06_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.06_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.06_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [**WHAT: **North Pocono, Dunmore and Moscow - Daily Phone Bank!

[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20e/1cd0ac28/15ad70eb7/357034cd/544128967/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20e/1cd0ac28/15ad70eb7/357034cc/544128967/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20e/1cd0ac28/15ad70eb7/357034c9/544128967/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20e/1cd0ac28/15ad70eb7/357034c8/544128967/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20e/1cd0ac28/15ad70eb7/357034cb/544128967/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b20e/1cd0ac28/15ad70eb7/357034c6/544128967/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Corky Messner
subject: FWD: INVITATION ENCLOSED: Meet-and-Greet with Corky!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or Click to learn more!
Peter,

My team emailed you last week about the Meet-and-Greet I'm hosting tomorrow, have you sent your RSVP yet?

Spots are running out quickly, so I wanted to make sure you reserved your spot!

I'm so grateful for all the support you've shown me over the last few months, and this is just one of the ways I can give back before Tuesday's critical Republican Primary.

I hope you can join me and the rest of my team tomorrow night in Bedford. Remember: the event is free, but space is limited! So if you haven't yet, _**[please submit your RSVP now by clicking here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/e571e9fbd2dc0321c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **_

\- Corky | |
---
**From** : Team Messner
**Sent:** Friday, September 4, 2020 10:33 AM
**To** : All Supporters
**Subject** : INVITATION ENCLOSED: Meet-and-Greet with Corky!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/2cdb25ab3593de81c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Primary Election Eve is always an exciting time. The day before the election is when all the hard work over the past few months begins to come to fruition.

And Corky, we want YOU to be a part of our Election Eve celebration in Bedford!
**Where** : Murphy's Taproom & Carriage House
**When** : Monday, September 7th, 1:00 P.M. - 2:30 P.M.
**RSVP** : _**[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bedford-primary-eve-meet-and-greet-tickets-119537250133](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/d8a31470ee5338b9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/696a0b85107f7d80c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky and everyone here at Team Messner are eager to see you Monday afternoon!

Tickets are free, but _there's limited space available so don't delay!_ [_**Just click or tap here to RSVP and secure your spot**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/94cfc43d8cd54db5c3d6b838967d376c/33153).

\- Team Messner

P.S. If you haven't yet, be sure to make a plan to vote on September 8th! Get started by finding your polling place, [_**just click or tap here to visit our official campaign election center**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/9a4a826e029939b8c3d6b838967d376c/33153).
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/04343a0629b96ac0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/cf4d3b5bcaf389c2/81b9c0aa095b17cac3d6b838967d376c/33153)

RSVP : Corky and everyone here at Team Messner are eager to see you Monday afternoon! Tickets are free, but there's limited space available so don't delay! . \- Team Messner P.S. * * *
---
Dear Friend, I read an op-ed that described President Gerald Ford's political calculations when the swine flu threatened the nation in 1976. The line that struck me was "Mr. Ford was advised that Congress would likely act anyway". Today, the notion that Congress might act as the independent, co-equal branch of government the Founding Fathers designed it to be is laughable. You can thank my opponent for that - he once stated that his legislative approach was informed by Taliban insurgency tactics. His record shows he's not a representative of the people, he's a rubber stamp for a Republican president, and a brick wall of opposition for a Democrat. I'll work with either Mr. Biden or Mr. Trump when their policies benefit the people of Central Texas and the country, and I'll stand up to them when they don't. Don't forget - we're only three points down in our most recent poll. **[Pitch in now and help me close the gap and beat Pete!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19031335/247294767/-1907457920?refcode=RKC_083120_em_fr_all_eoq2_Line3&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQ1MDllYy01MmYwLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5EgJWWUBcWT188xYXaa6AZyv9f0CwhauqvkCbuFWo8=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19031336/247294768/-1907457920?refcode=0906_Donor_Button50&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQ1MDllYy01MmYwLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5EgJWWUBcWT188xYXaa6AZyv9f0CwhauqvkCbuFWo8=)

Friend,

We just sent President Trump the first round of entrants to win an opportunity to meet him in Washington, D.C., on September 25th, and he was disappointed that your name was MISSING.

Why is that?

GOOD NEWS - there is still time to enter to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for you and a guest of your choice.

name: Margaret Good
subject: My mom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19032204/247317324/-940294256?refcode=090720-es-my-mom-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmY5ZWJhZC01YWYwLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJzRZBBv2rSEwyLtW_NkZh6pXxIeTgBcW3XVYPb0ND4=&emci=0e113ef4-59f0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=a2f9ebad-5af0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

When I was a little girl, my mom would ask me what I wanted to be when I grew up. My answer was always the same: a professional baseball player, or President of the United States.
Friend,

When I was a little girl, my mom would ask me what I wanted to be when I grew up. My answer was always the same: a professional baseball player, or President of the United States.

She inevitably would respond that, when she was growing up, she felt like she had only two choices: she could be either a teacher or a nurse. She became a nurse and spent her entire career helping people when they needed it most. My two aunts became teachers, devoting their lives to educating future generations.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19032205/247317325/1073285021?refcode2=a2f9ebad-5af0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=0e113ef4-59f0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=a2f9ebad-5af0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=090720-es-my-mom-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmY5ZWJhZC01YWYwLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJzRZBBv2rSEwyLtW_NkZh6pXxIeTgBcW3XVYPb0ND4=)
I will always be immensely proud of my family and their commitment to their communities and their careers, but hearing that from my mom -- that she felt her choices were so limited -- has always stayed with me, driven me, and inspired me throughout my life.

My mom has made me determined to build a world where people do not feel that their opportunities are limited because of who they are. That is why I started out working in nonprofits like City Year and the United Way, and then, because I wanted more choices, I went to law school, and ran for office.

My mom inspired me to build a better world for everyone, where our opportunities are not limited because of who we are. Where we all can pursue our dreams and our passions.

**[Together, we have an opportunity to flip this congressional seat blue and create real change. Will you join me and my mom in working to build a better, fairer world, where our opportunities are limitless?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19032207/247317327/1073285021?refcode2=a2f9ebad-5af0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=0e113ef4-59f0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=a2f9ebad-5af0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=090720-es-my-mom-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmY5ZWJhZC01YWYwLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJzRZBBv2rSEwyLtW_NkZh6pXxIeTgBcW3XVYPb0ND4=)**

Thank you for your time and support,

Margaret

clean_body: When I was a little girl, my mom would ask me what I wanted to be when I grew up. My answer was always the same: a professional baseball player, or President of the United States. Friend, When I was a little girl, my mom would ask me what I wanted to be when I grew up. My answer was always the same: a professional baseball player, or President of the United States. She inevitably would respond that, when she was growing up, she felt like she had only two choices: she could be either a teacher or a nurse. She became a nurse and spent her entire career helping people when they needed it most. My two aunts became teachers, devoting their lives to educating future generations. = I will always be immensely proud of my family and their commitment to their communities and their careers, but hearing that from my mom -- that she felt her choices were so limited -- has always stayed with me, driven me, and inspired me throughout my life. My mom has made me determined to build a world where people do not feel that their opportunities are limited because of who they are. That is why I started out working in nonprofits like City Year and the United Way, and then, because I wanted more choices, I went to law school, and ran for office. My mom inspired me to build a better world for everyone, where our opportunities are not limited because of who we are. Where we all can pursue our dreams and our passions. = Thank you for your time and support, Margaret = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. name: Biden for President
subject: Updated campaign priorities list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As we put our battleground state strategies into overdrive, our campaign's list of needs is piling up. |
---
Peter,

Time is running out in this election. **Ballots are already being sent out in North Carolina, and early voting starts _next week_ in key states like Michigan, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and more,** and as we put our battleground state strategies into overdrive, our campaign's list of needs is piling up.

Grassroots donors just like you provide 95% of our campaign's contributions, and we rely on you to plug the gaps in our budget and make sure we can run the best campaign possible to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

[So Peter, please take a look at our updated list of campaign priorities below, then chip in your first $25 or whatever you can afford to support Joe and Kamala in these areas and more:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") **[Donate to fund new digital ads >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

[Donate to expand our reach on television >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

[Donate to support our grassroots organizing >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

[Donate to build the best possible GOTV programs >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

[Donate for all of the above >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")** Peter, each and every contribution you chip in supports these campaign activities -- but that just scratches the surface of the impact that you have as a grassroots donor.

When you donate, you're owning a piece of this campaign, and investing in a brighter future for our kids and grandkids. You're sending a message to the world, that we reject Donald Trump's failed leadership, and we are better than this. And you're having a direct impact on the outcome of this election, starting in the crucial states that will begin early voting next week.

[If you could chip in $25 before early voting starts, it would be a huge help to the campaign:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B1_support_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Friend,

Did you hear about our big volunteer drive this weekend?

We’re having a _HUGE_ turnout! We’ve got dozens of volunteers knocking on doors all over the district, and dozens more making phone calls.

_**One thing’s for certain: these volunteers are all in for Matt Mowers.**_

Right now, the volunteers are paying for lunch and gas out of pocket. We want to thank them for all their hard work this weekend by picking up food and filling up their tanks. **But we won’t be able to do it without your help, friend.**

**Will you chip in whatever you can to help us provide food and gas for our dedicated volunteers?**
|

disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We can't let this happen.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f82/7f51f7bc/42c5913b/4efacfac/2582674982/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **ONE-DAY MATCHED EMAIL GOAL: $50,000
DEADLINE: **MIDNIGHT****

| **[MAKE A MATCHED DONATION](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f82/7f51f7bc/42c5913b/4efacfa3/2582674982/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200906.1nd__2046__&amount=10")**
---
Hey Peter!

With Election Day **less than two months away,** we're working night and day to build a powerful, dynamic, and strong campaign to fight back against Senator Cornyn's big-money backers. Thanks to his corporate PAC and special interest allies, Sen. Cornyn is on the air with TV ads, and he's reaching out to key undecided voters across the state!

**[We CAN'T let him persuade those voters with misleading ads! We need your help right now to get to them first with MJ's message. Make double the impact with a MATCHED donation right now!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f82/7f51f7bc/42c5913b/4efacfa3/2582674982/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200906.1nd__2046__&amount=10")**

MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs and that makes it all the more important to reach grassroots fundraising goals like today's. We need to raise **$50,000** by midnight so we can reach all the undecided voters out there before Sen. Cornyn does. **Will you make a matched donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 (becomes $10)>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f82/7f51f7bc/42c5913b/4efacfa2/2582674982/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200906.1nd__2046__&amount=5")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f82/7f51f7bc/42c5913b/4efacfa5/2582674982/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2046&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. name: Team Warner
subject: connecting with folks around the Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

With the coronavirus still threatening communities across the Commonwealth and across the country, we've had to find new ways to connect with voters to keep all of Mark's constituents safe.

This campaign brought us more Zoom calls than we've ever thought possible. And Mark has also found ways to meet with folks in their communities to hear more about the issues that matter to them -- it's just meant that more events are happening outside, or at a distance. He's been all over the Commonwealth to hear from community leaders about the challenges they're facing and the changes they'd like to see. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c880480/971161263/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200906_f_1_nd__760__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
_Mark toured the Emil and Grace Shihadeh Innovation Center in Winchester and talked with educators about the importance of investing in technology and career training._
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c880480/971161263/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200906_f_1_nd__760__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
_Mark met with small business owners at Twinpanzee Brewery in Sterling to hear about the challenges they face during the coronavirus pandemic._
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c880480/971161263/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200906_f_1_nd__760__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
_Mark met with veterans and military families to talk about how we can ensure that members of our military have the physical and mental health resources they need during and after their service._
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c880480/971161263/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200906_f_1_nd__760__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
_Mark met with retired coal miners and other community leaders in Abingdon to talk about the resources their communities need as we continue to face the coronavirus pandemic._
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c880480/971161263/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200906_f_1_nd__760__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
_Our amazing Team Warner volunteers are also making sure that folks can show their support for Mark 's campaign with a yard sign._
No matter what challenges we face, Team Warner is committed to connecting with voters. And while we haven't been able to gather together in rallies like in years past, we've built a pretty incredible online community. **Make sure you 're keeping up with Team Warner on [Facebook](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c88048f/971161263/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/MarkWarnerVa/"), [Twitter](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c88048e/971161263/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://twitter.com/markwarnerva"), and [Instagram](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c88048d/971161263/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.instagram.com/markwarnerva/") -- that's the best way to get real time updates from our team.**

We're now less than 60 days away from Election Day on November 3rd -- let's go out and win! Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

P.S. If you're ready to take the leap to volunteering in this new digital format, make sure you check out our [**Digital Organizing**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c88048c/971161263/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/digital-organizing/") page.

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c88048b/971161263/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate?refcode=20200906_f_1_nd__760__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dae4/53d9897e/55c67046/1c88048a/971161263/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Todd Cheewing
subject: 🚨 TWO DAYS! 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click for more info!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3e34220e4b87a921/fbba5b59d884e7ffc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, This is critical, and I know you're likely busy today so I'll get right to the point: __have you made a plan to VOTE in Tuesday's Republican Primary?__

There have been so many variables in this year's election, we can't let voter turnout be another one. We need EVERY grassroots supporter to make their voice heard at the ballot box.

Our team has set up an election center where you can get more information on voting. If you haven't found your polling place and made a plan yet, this is a great place to start! _**[Just click or tap here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3e34220e4b87a921/ff4c82d67851ee26c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_. [Find Your Polling Location!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3e34220e4b87a921/3b692d62b6ed0f14c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, D.C. Jeanne Shaheen and her liberal cronies have run our country into the ground for too long, and Corky is the only candidate who can finally get her out of the U.S. Senate.

He's a Trump-endorsed Republican who won't shy away from the tough decisions, but will address them head on. Our country needs new leadership, not the same old career politicians at the helm.

It's time we made a change, and together we can make it happen.

**It all starts on Tuesday.** \- Todd Cheewing, Team Messner

P.S. If you haven't found your polling place yet, _**[just click or tap here to visit the campaign's official election center!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3e34220e4b87a921/8e93d82875b18255c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3e34220e4b87a921/d6139b7f317c4128c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/3e34220e4b87a921/3e54792ce992b565c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Brianna Carmen, Voto Latino
subject: Do the right thing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
EVERY. SINGLE. VOTE. MATTERS. |
#
Hi Peter, Whenever Trump and his administration attack us, we double down on our efforts to fight back. He reminds us not to sit home on election day but to run to the polls and vote against hate in all its forms. Latinxs are the second largest demographic voting bloc for the first time ever, and we’re the youngest and fastest-growing constituency in the United States. If we all show up — nothing can stop us. **That’s why we need you, Peter, to make sure everyone you know is registered to vote. Voto Latino has set a goal to register one million voters by November 2020 — and you can help by registering at least one friend right now.** **EVERY. SINGLE. VOTE. MATTERS.** **Forward this email to three friends and ask them to register to vote.** | | [REGISTER TO VOTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19034942/247382506/35282046?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzE4ZjE2MC03M2YwLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjMeccFsAQpZjI-UgtqZaIs7zPo47y6umORnP-lNUPM=&emci=aca6e3be-1358-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=1c18f160-73f0-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=1959553)
---
We are the future of America. **And we vote.**
Adelante,
Brianna Carmen
Director of Organizing and Partnerships
PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO

Washington, DC 20033

name: Sabina
subject: we need to talk about my mom, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Peter, I need to talk to you about my mom, Kara Eastman.

I'm so proud of her.

She's running to unseat the most vulnerable Republican in Congress, Don Bacon.

[**_I 'll be honest, emailing strangers for money is new to me. But I know what is at stake. My mom needs to raise $5,200 in the next 24 hours or she'll be forced to make devastating budget cuts. So I'm asking, please donate at this make-or-break moment >>_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e836/77d4c309/21ae53bb/2635e50d/1320635725/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200906_em_fr_b1_sabina_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Let me explain:

[**Here's what you need to know about my mom:**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e836/77d4c309/21ae53bb/2635e50d/1320635725/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200906_em_fr_b1_sabina_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Growing up, I watched my mom run a homeless shelter, start a nonprofit for kids, and advocate for underserved communities in Omaha every day.

She did all that while raising me and supporting my grandmother, who fought cancer _five times_ until she passed away in 2017.

My grandmother's medical bills were endless and confusing. She had to forgo a pill that cost $2,500. When my mom saw Don Bacon vote to rip healthcare away from millions she made the decision to run for Congress and unseat him.

My mom embodies the values of compassion, strength, and generosity, and she ingrained those values in me every day growing up.

[**_My mom is exactly who we need fighting for us in Congress, not Don Bacon. If you agree, I 'm asking you to chip in just $5 so she can win >> _**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e836/77d4c309/21ae53bb/2635e50d/1320635725/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200906_em_fr_b1_sabina_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

[**Here 's what you need to know about this race: My mom has the best shot in the country to flip a seat from red to blue.**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e836/77d4c309/21ae53bb/2635e50d/1320635725/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200906_em_fr_b1_sabina_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

She just pulled ahead of Bacon in the polls by **_[1 point.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e836/77d4c309/21ae53bb/2635e50d/1320635725/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200906_em_fr_b1_sabina_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

It's gonna be a tight race, but I know Democrats are ready to OUST Bacon, FLIP this seat, and ELECT MY MOM! **[Here's how you can have a massive impact:](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e836/77d4c309/21ae53bb/2635e50d/1320635725/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200906_em_fr_b1_sabina_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** Our campaign is funded by people, not corporations.

It's grassroots donations from people like you, Peter, that will determine whether my mom wins or loses in November.

**[Can I count on you to chip in to meet our goal of $5,200? Even a couple of dollars gets us closer to beating Don Bacon in November. body:
Our biggest month yet |
---
Friend, we'll be blunt:

For Jon Ossoff to win here in Georgia, **we need September to be our biggest month yet.**

Mitch McConnell's super PAC has _already poured in more money to defeat Jon than any other Democratic Senate candidate_ , and it's expected to continue that massive spending.

With an extra emphasis on early voting and voting by mail this year because of the pandemic, **Election Day is already here.** _Early voting will begin very soon, and voters are applying for absentee ballots NOW!_

We're running out of time, friend. We need a _HUGE_ month to keep pace with the McConnell super PAC money fueling David Perdue's campaign.

Unlike Perdue, our campaign isn't taking any contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. But we have this grassroots, small-dollar team powered by people like you -- and we know you are up for the challenge.

**[Today, as we approach Election Season, will you pitch in $20 to make September the month that powers Jon to victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a47/5b2c1286/38a2f3e5/25f08e2f/2060652052/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_06_biggest_mnth?refcode=em_2020_09_06_biggest_mnth&amount=20")**

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b281/18e32a7f/4a4af6ca/7b20f6d3/4153566868/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b281/18e32a7f/4a4af6ca/7b20f6d0/4153566868/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b281/18e32a7f/4a4af6ca/7b20f6d1/4153566868/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b281/18e32a7f/4a4af6ca/7b20f6dd/4153566868/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b281/18e32a7f/4a4af6ca/7b20f6df/4153566868/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b281/18e32a7f/4a4af6ca/7b20f6d6/4153566868/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Team Joe
subject: We've got a packed calendar, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
September will go by in a blink of an eye, and we need to hustle every single day. |
---
Peter,

We sat down this morning to take a look at what's on our calendar, and let us tell you, September is packed.

Here's what we've got going on:
* Post-Labor Day is when folks will really start to tune into this election (and when undecided voters will start to decide who they're casting ballots for this year).
* Voters in North Carolina, Minnesota, South Dakota, Wyoming, New Jersey, Virginia, Michigan, Vermont, and Illinois begin to cast their ballots.
* We'll have our first presidential debate where Joe will go face-to-face with Trump in prime time.
* We'll give our organizers the tools they need to continue reaching voters and volunteers.
* We'll keep investing in ads in key battleground states.

And that's just September. In October, we'll have three more debates, dozens of states where voters will be able to vote early, and just a few short weeks until Election Day.

[That's why we're asking you to chip in $25 right now, Peter, because with a schedule this busy, the more work we do today, the stronger we'll be as we go into the final 58 days of this fight for the soul of our nation.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B2_sept_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.06_B2_sept_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: September will go by in a blink of an eye, and we need to hustle every single day. | Peter, We sat down this morning to take a look at what's on our calendar, and let us tell you, September is packed. Here's what we've got going on: Post-Labor Day is when folks will really start to tune into this election (and when undecided voters will start to decide who they're casting ballots for this year). Voters in North Carolina, Minnesota, South Dakota, Wyoming, New Jersey, Virginia, Michigan, Vermont, and Illinois begin to cast their ballots. We'll have our first presidential debate where Joe will go face-to-face with Trump in prime time. We'll give our organizers the tools they need to continue reaching voters and volunteers. * We'll keep investing in ads in key battleground states. And that's just September. In October, we'll have three more debates, dozens of states where voters will be able to vote early, and just a few short weeks until Election Day. As Auditor General, Eugene has fought to hold powerful people accountable and deliver a more even playing field for PA families.

He’s exactly the type of leader we need in Washington to continue delivering on the issues that matter most to hard-working families, such as ensuring access to affordable health care, lowering prescription drug costs, protecting Social Security, and rebuilding our economy.

**Look, Eugene is the absolute best person to represent South Central PA in Congress, and I know he will make the hard-working people of his community proud.

It is critical that we’re not only protecting our Democratic House Majority this November, but that we’re expanding it. = | = As Auditor General, Eugene has fought to hold powerful people accountable and deliver a more even playing field for PA families. He’s exactly the type of leader we need in Washington to continue delivering on the issues that matter most to hard-working families, such as ensuring access to affordable health care, lowering prescription drug costs, protecting Social Security, and rebuilding our economy. | | Wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter! With polls tightening, it's crucial we reach undecided voters _before_ Sen. Cornyn begins blanketing the airwaves with more ads.

MJ is a decorated combat veteran and working mom and she's fighting for the things that matter to Texans, like making sure everyone can get the health coverage they need. It's critical that every voter knows that!

[**Can we count on you to make a MATCHED donation before our midnight deadline?**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f8d/7f51f7bc/42d8e281/4efacf90/1055617779/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200906.2nd__2048__&amount=10")

Amanda Sherman
Communications Director

From: **MJ Hegar Outreach Team**
Subject: Sen. Cornyn is beating us to key voters!

> Hi Peter!
>
> With Election Day **less than two months away,** we're working night and day to build a powerful, dynamic, and strong campaign to fight back against Senator Cornyn's big-money backers. Thanks to his corporate PAC and special interest allies, Sen. Cornyn is on the air with TV ads, and he's reaching out to key undecided voters across the state!
>
> **[We CAN'T let him persuade those voters with misleading ads! We need your help right now to get to them first with MJ's message. Make double the impact with a MATCHED donation right now!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f8d/7f51f7bc/42d8e281/4efacf90/1055617779/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200906.2nd__2048__&amount=10")**

> MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs and that makes it all the more important to reach grassroots fundraising goals like today's. We need to raise **$50,000** by midnight so we can reach all the undecided voters out there before Sen. Cornyn does. **Will you make a matched donation today?**

> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f8d/7f51f7bc/42d8e281/4efacf8a/1055617779/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200906.2nd__2048__")**

name: Team Ossoff
subject: we can't trust anything he says
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
David Perdue will do anything his corporate donors ask. |
---
This is despicable, friend.

We just can't trust anything David Perdue says. Take a look at what The Intercept has reported:
| In public, Perdue: | But in private:
---|---
Cosigned a letter decrying the H-2B visa program for its impact on American workers. | He requested the government RAISE the number of H-2B visas so his business buddies can exploit cheap labor.
Bashed immigrants for taking American jobs, and has said their labor "strain[s] working-class Americans." | His business closed plants in Georgia to OUTSOURCE jobs overseas.

This much is clear: **David Perdue will do anything his corporate donors ask him to do. He is acting in his own interest and those of his closest friends.**

Georgia deserves better than that, friend.

Jon Ossoff has spent his career taking down corruption like this -- he knows what it takes, and he'll get it done. But he can't do it alone.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help get Perdue OUT?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2a41/5b2c1286/38a75ae4/25f08e7d/1384310326/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_06_perdue_wkrs?refcode=em_2020_09_06_perdue_wkrs")**

**WEEK IN REVIEW**
Friend,

This was a BIG WEEK for #TeamMace. From hosting Second Lady Karen Pence, to being interviewed by the Post and Courier for their Pints and Politics series, to opening the Hilton Head Island GOP office--our team had a busy week.

Our whole team wishes you a very happy Labor Day tomorrow!

Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from my team each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org 📩

[WATCH ABC 4's coverage of our event here.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=38ea1e7c99a749738cd24905167d07ce&_e=f5GSzeOjuLzugVrsEBEd773gHG9tcRYNSFoZGzEsT_hLUznPVf0njS2Q-9T-WQjGkiP9M_plZXMgZwwoX9OlOuM4F_EaarkhWc2eHdp5AQDwUg-LWgkuzHtO6ROcNd52vnVQ59U5oZmUErPR1uRbPZSVLLZXk9A-QfZBmXpYadp5in5FowrW5vDbPGBNshLTVWjJipgQnCygfLP1i_bghLyNYz6AFMi11Hx1TXADsC8z6v9jridbugLrHOJIze9pj8mvZFZkp1xN69CXLOeftcE8LBgNLhI0nKlbo76DcPBvXaXehAJh0D02gouD9foqovrZ4lg6FX530z2RtykaVRqWlQAvgzxk67UIgrWE-WAP9Q7OzY9fnwIwpJWDM8K0FEac4mh_QRcMSnLHw3eOOkbZgnevQYlfr9jc8pCnjkah9bCzGz-Gz_K8_s1cMDI0)

**[DAN AGREES: SMALL BUSINESSES NEED HELP NOW.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=38ea1e7c99a749738cd24905167d07ce&_e=f5GSzeOjuLzugVrsEBEd74ZOEbZ9btBjxc5iwO7-4nJFTq1qj6RPQriIlNCnUqQqgmxZAYwnywFjqK17PETD5k3vjhmdQOOC0bXEJrXAzL-4vuSQg6xzYyzL_xhNZ2sio5YsORiDIrHruy61CaXNzPpLSpnLqRtuRvc84Eve7Zxmwi2w2qJHyt1Q_bdW4G3R38F_Tmq4eG7NxaX73HS3aGIaF5xOefQ-9AP3KIrvpYUKFBADslCTwBgxbdZmQ7XqWQDcd0rUKbcKnFyoKkAi5qEXBQFrciNRZ6uA9TP5W5QmhsAWi-U4AcSR2VwS3_pt1yY5pNVYKlWmH4kzNTdVsbAgB3vgCvFX38MqkB3mu60I2CVXM7Q8-fWJXY--UptCHDPR8XlSic0JnYE8jKn1zznsQKgrvMxtyW7BhHN2Wah5U6Xi1F5PywhiG3EsejEam3vm0hg6lvvCwNhNZKvupXZIxpDQgdqzFNg5YGjZMUlrBpZE4gIz4JfWKzYsYHnmqjQ8ARu7ukL2yWDDICXD1OD4FPHHlxVOkxLQMVnTL53d4N_Dyo8EDBfZ53EJo09Y0oROgAp7vjNvLPUvmRkcIxoiIb8zb1judjALnjylhf5MOqX061wBtyfXtvEla40S3Qh1BlpvAor8ZcSB6Y41ChNdYMQExQBvY5lWPFLiZbs%3D)**
As part of its COVID-19 relief package, Congress is allowing small businesses to write off their losses related to the pandemic. Here's the issue: they aren't allowed to write off these losses until NEXT year. These small businesses need help NOW--and Congress has the power to allow them to write off their losses the next time they file their taxes, not next year. [READ Dan's Letter to the Editor here.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=38ea1e7c99a749738cd24905167d07ce&_e=f5GSzeOjuLzugVrsEBEd74ZOEbZ9btBjxc5iwO7-4nJFTq1qj6RPQriIlNCnUqQqgmxZAYwnywFjqK17PETD5k3vjhmdQOOC0bXEJrXAzL-4vuSQg6xzYyzL_xhNZ2sio5YsORiDIrHruy61CaXNzPpLSpnLqRtuRvc84Eve7Zxmwi2w2qJHyt1Q_bdW4G3R38F_Tmq4eG7NxaX73HS3aGIaF5xOefQ-9AP3KIrvpYUKFBADslCTwBgxbdZmQ7XqWQDcd0rUKbcKnFyoKkAi5qEXBQFrciNRZ6uA9TP5W5QmhsAWi-U4AcSR2VwS3_pt1yY5pNVYKlWmH4kzNTdVsbAgB3vgCvFX38MqkB3mu60I2CVXM7Q8-fWJXY--UptCHDPR8XlSic0JnYE8jKn1zznsQKgrvMxtyW7BhHN2Wah5U6Xi1F5PywhiG3EsejEam3vm0hg6lvvCwNhNZKvupbkaT0FiDXwxynGkaYhSaTbQM3Ry3eT1EdvVc8cuCoGdMMLZHU9L20tUqog6wlJ4D9Xk2c3Fqgh_qfqNA8jyi1MZFmp3gRyz0Jz3iS3bE77A_B_Sp7JVyYJ7cllGb1d2Waq1rJsE9FeiJWI3eUJlHxO9uc3QRprhgJBHSdSuAeleX0HC5aVaunWC0hqEAYlLD9dbRmmzMKREIFgM70fBilU%3D)

**[NANCY MACE FEATURED ON PINTS AND POLITICS](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=38ea1e7c99a749738cd24905167d07ce&_e=f5GSzeOjuLzugVrsEBEd71xOGDKDY1RzknD7l6amBHSp4bf9I7DbyYOFFdoDGtqe68pY4pnsQmZfjT4pR10eNEj2VLdYiiz_f3smUM6JYdSgTqFuJ5kZR81RrIdXaVVR3n5WLfd5Wyi7-XlGhtfQrH81Sz1U9OKYX4HznluDQSamqKmDMEL1cgraE8Nyq-OO4M0lzUnyg6E_AdJR6uehb-0zASuhnZsl5DMD1UG-wdrdl1z5v-rjcXil8D4VQPHdWHBbLcqkg-b3XDaImavmkrJIY86fnf2aa_enfQBNI6qntGlNPMeN04IQeMs4OoujSUpor3xkREWvbHf1XL5XdwIcdFM4aiGSbkJTkfwG4j8F3jFFK82Fjd8BqA79fKuPXUIdurKNcIbX3zvjssYiyvss2QMkiNR80serh0n9mgE%3D)**
The Post and Courier featured Nancy in their Pints and Politics series. They covered everything from offshore drilling, to the RNC, to what style of barbecue Nancy prefers. [WATCH the interview here.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=38ea1e7c99a749738cd24905167d07ce&_e=f5GSzeOjuLzugVrsEBEd71xOGDKDY1RzknD7l6amBHSp4bf9I7DbyYOFFdoDGtqe68pY4pnsQmZfjT4pR10eNEj2VLdYiiz_f3smUM6JYdSgTqFuJ5kZR81RrIdXaVVR3n5WLfd5Wyi7-XlGhtfQrH81Sz1U9OKYX4HznluDQSamqKmDMEL1cgraE8Nyq-OOVQN4gnwgo388r_QPANQ0hC0mwUWpUqWvu1G6YjW10xpFJq62f_eQhzmncFD_gVbAnOM4QBOqQ1k9dyn4zmX7qrh3-E8I0bJbqMQ6y_G0XhhFgtJ-gElz_kZuwQE24rC9fi5fNrv7Wpm9zuXgFG3OTnola_EBY0J3iC8rkuA4SKJaCtb1bdQQ6PMFS-J4M0_vgVob_fIfDWO4pRUf7138XRt_7OM3M2AENIMvWvKiYrU%3D)

clean_body: | | WEEK IN REVIEW Friend, This was a BIG WEEK for #TeamMace. From hosting Second Lady Karen Pence, to being interviewed by the Post and Courier for their Pints and Politics series, to opening the Hilton Head Island GOP office--our team had a busy week. Our whole team wishes you a very happy Labor Day tomorrow! Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from my team each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org 📩 This Week on the Campaign Trail This week, our team hosted Second Lady Karen Pence. It’s an honor to have the full backing of this White House, VP Pence and our Second Lady Karen Pence. Our Second Lady knows that the balance of the House runs right through the Lowcountry. As part of its COVID-19 relief package, Congress is allowing small businesses to write off their losses related to the pandemic. Here's the issue: they aren't allowed to write off these losses until NEXT year. These small businesses need help NOW--and Congress has the power to allow them to write off their losses the next time they file their taxes, not next year. The Post and Courier featured Nancy in their Pints and Politics series. They covered everything from offshore drilling, to the RNC, to what style of barbecue Nancy prefers. Nancy Pelosi pushes for restrictive regulations on hair salons, but doesn't follow those rules herself. This week, the Hilton Head Island Republican Office opened. Nancy shared our #LowcountryFirst message at the ribbon cutting. | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Something you may not know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
You may not know this about me, but I've been a card-carrying member of the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 441 for over 20 years.

As a former labor lawyer and a founding member of the Labor and Working Families Caucus, I know what it means to be on the side of workers. Throughout my time in Congress, I've fought to implement a pro-labor agenda that will help hard-working families across the country.

That's why, as long as I'm in Congress, I will continue to fight for legislation that benefits working people -- like raising the minimum wage, increasing project labor agreements, and expanding the National Labor Relations Act.

The people of CA-38 deserve a Representative who will advocate for working families and defend hard-won worker protections. Will you help me win in November, so I can keep fighting on behalf of working Americans in Congress?

Thank you so much,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/Dan0lxQrnOhwbKscQHbOQgxIQx3-Z7vouyoe_Fqud7k=/cH0uFQ29Aq7iv1zoJG9KA1yPEcMrxjVVLZeX-K0lOnw=.

As a former labor lawyer and a founding member of the Labor and Working Families Caucus, I know what it means to be on the side of workers. Throughout my time in Congress, I've fought to implement a pro-labor agenda that will help hard-working families across the country. That's why, as long as I'm in Congress, I will continue to fight for legislation that benefits working people -- like raising the minimum wage, increasing project labor agreements, and expanding the National Labor Relations Act. The people of CA-38 deserve a Representative who will advocate for working families and defend hard-won worker protections. Will you help me win in November, so I can keep fighting on behalf of working Americans in Congress? Thank you so much, -- Linda Sánchez | Paid for by Stand with Sánchez | Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. p.p1 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'}

subject: QUIZ: Test your campaign knowledge, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We all have a responsibility to everything we can to win this election. |
---
Peter, as we get closer and closer to Election Day, **we're seeing more and more grassroots supporters just like you get off the sidelines and take their support for Joe and Kamala's campaign to the next level.**

They know that we all have a responsibility to do everything we can to win this election and make Donald Trump a one-term president -- and that chipping in any amount of money, even $25, is one great way to make an impact.

We're very proud of the number of first-time donors to this campaign last month alone -- and honestly, it's so high that it might surprise you.

**Peter, can you guess how many grassroots supporters chipped in their first donation last month to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris?** 500,000
1,000,000
1,500,000 | [SUBMIT](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b217/1cd0ac28/15caca1f3/3570447b/548087568/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-non-donor-quiz?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.06_B4_quiz_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.09.06_B4_quiz_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Want to End Walz' Power?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Want to End Governor Walz' Emergency Powers RIGHT NOW? Senate Republicans have an ace up their sleeve that they finally employed for the first time last month... **They have the power to FIRE Walz' Commissioners. Especially the one he just weaponized against our small businesses. Let me explain.** As you know, Governor Walz has used emergency powers to shut down small businesses and trample on our civil liberties. But now Walz is weaponizing Minnesota Dept of Health Commissioner Jan Malcom to act as a hit squad on our business community. According to Kare11, [Malcolm is "](http://www.action4liberty.com/malcolm_needs_to_go?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=2)[planning to conduct extra compliance checks for COVID-19 safety measures at bars and restaurants in the coming weeks](http://www.action4liberty.com/malcolm_needs_to_go?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=3)." Violations of certain COVID orders issued unilaterally by Walz carry fines of up to $25,000 and 90 days in jail for business owners; an aggregious use of power since criminal laws can't be passed without the legislative branch. It's hard enough for small businesses to thrive in Walz' "One Minnesota" with constant threats of rioting/looting and adapting to the new marketplace post-COVID. Now our small businesses will have one further worry: Walz' hit squad led by Malcolm. This isn't the only issue with Jan Malcolm's tenure as the Commissioner of the state's most critical department. It was revealed back in May that the Dept of Health was using undergraduate students to determine COVID modeling data, which has now been found to be completely flawed. Walz uses Malcolm's statistics as the basis for his abusive executive orders. **Many Republican legislators at the Capitol allege that the Department has inflated its COVID case numbers, including Senator and physician Scott Jensen.** Malcolm also admitted that Walz' original order prohibiting surgeries in Minnesota was a mistake. “If I could roll back time I would not have had us use the word ‘elective’ procedures when talking about the original executive order" [Malcolm said](http://www.action4liberty.com/malcolm_needs_to_go?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=4). Certainly this gross abuse of emergency powers led to the deaths of Minnesotans who should have received important medical procedures in that period of time. Weaponizing the Dept of Health against small businesses in our state is about as cold-hearted, totalitarian as it gets. Walz continues to act as if he is capable of creating his owns laws and his compliant Commissioners like Malcolm are his enforcers. Are we still a free country?! Although Malcom is commonly referred in the media and at the Capitol as "Commissioner", her appointment by Walz has never been approved by the Republican controlled Minnesota Senate. It currently awaits floor action that Majority Leader Paul Gazelka or his leadership team, like Assistant Majority Leader, Warren Limmer, can bring to a floor vote. In other words, at any time, Senate Republicans can do something about Walz' weaponization of the Dept of Health: **they could fire Jan Malcolm!** Republicans have been kicked in the teeth by Walz’ authoritarian edict that House Democrats continue to rubber-stamp. They need to fight fire with fire and send Malcom packing to send a message that these illegal Emergency Orders won’t stand and Walz will pay a price.**** Action 4 Liberty has been leading the charge since the beginning on passing the legislative resolutions to End Walz’ Power. We only had 15 House Republicans voting with us back in mid April. Now we have all 59 House Republicans, 4 House Democrats, and the Minnesota Senate on board. **At this point, the next step that's needed is to let the Democrats know there will be a price to pay if they allow these illegal powers to continue on.** Sure, the media and Democrats will cry bloody murder. But the average Minnesotan won't shed a tear watching a political appointed bureaucrat lose a job when thousands of Minnesota businesses are going under as a direct result of the Walz' Administration's toxic leadership. This is the one fighting chance we have in this state to finally hold Walz accountable for abusing the laws and ruling by authoritarian dictate. Weak Republicans need to actually stand up and fight like mad dogs. While Walz and Attorney General Keith Ellison are willing to threaten jail and fines, Republicans need to pull out all the stops and rain down political bombs to send a message this will not stand. Anything less is weakness.**** **If Senate Republicans are serious about ending Walz' Emergency Powers, which the Governor and House Democrats have no intention of doing themselves, then they need to fire Jan Malcolm.**
### **Senator Paul Gazelka (Majority Leader)**
### **Call or text: 218-821-9287**
### **Email: sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn**
### **Senator Warren Limmer (Assistant Majority Leader)**
### **Call: 651-296-2159**
### **Email: sen.warren.limmer@senate.mn **
**Script:** Senator, Minnesota Senate Republicans MUST bring pain to the Walz Administration until he or House Democrats are willing to end his abusive emergency powers. You have the power to fire Jan Malcolm, Walz' small business hit squad leader. Walz just weaponized MDH to go after our businesses and you MUST do something about that immediately. Fire Malcolm unless Walz end's his emergency powers. Anything less shows that Republicans are useless politicians who aren't willing to fight for us against this enormous threat to our liberty. **Alternate Script:** Senator, I saw how Republicans in the Senate fired one of Walz' Commissioners in August and for the first time, I was proud you guys had some backbone. Now is the time to employ the same move and fire the leader of Walz' hit squad, Jan Malcolm. The Governor just weaponized her to go after small businesses in Minnesota who are barely able to survive in this climate. You need to fire Malcolm now unless Walz' is willing to give up his emergency powers. Also, if you haven't signed our petition to End Walz' Emergency Powers, please sign right now. | [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=5 "SIGN THE PETITION") [SIGN THE PETITION](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=6)
---
Stay connected with what we are doing by visiting [**action4liberty.com**](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=7) or connecting with us on our [Facebook page](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4s5erbPF9ddrQ2TYfxqr6WhE6UwE3fGtGTlc1vzQFknU-&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=8).
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_end_walz_power&n=11), software for leaders.

Friend,
Sleepy Joe FINALLY came out of his basement, only to disappoint the American People yet again.

He went on LIVE TV and REFUSED to condemn (or even mention) Radical Left-wing groups like ANTIFA. He is willing to watch these dangerous THUGS burn our communities to the ground in order to appease his liberal base. How pathetic. We can’t let him get away with it. I want you to know that as long as I am your President, I will defend the rights of law-abiding citizens and honor the heroes that Keep Americans Safe.

The Liberal Mob will come after you on the streets simply for not agreeing with them. They hate our country and they hate YOU.

The Election is just under 2 MONTHS AWAY, and I need my best supporters to step up to the front lines as we head into November. With your help, I want to send a message to remind Joe Biden that, despite his best efforts (or lack thereof), WE WILL RESTORE LAW AND ORDER.

name: Team Carney
subject: The Delaware WE know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/M0rIR57704sxmbKiunfNeQ==?midqs=CAvTR7x0pJ1YRe1cGsoPRA==)
## [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/M0rIR57704sxmbKiunfNeQ==)
---

Sorry to bother you during Labor Day weekend, but we had to share this news and ask for your help pushing back. President Trump's supporters at the Heritage Foundation know he's losing this election to Joe Biden. Now they're attacking our state in an attempt to score cheap political points.

**The authors of this article are grasping at straws, and their argument couldn 't be more out of touch. Here's the Delaware we know:**
* We have an **[entrepreneurial, talented workforce](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/sJ8uOtbrwiMFV8J7kk9NGg==)** fueled by the University of Delaware, Delaware State University and Delaware Technical Community College.
* Delaware has a long tradition of innovation, and we consistently **[rank among the top states in science and technology investment](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/Mslx7s-lnJY8srpc-FDEpw==)[. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/Mslx7s-lnJY8srpc-FDEpw==)**
* **[Working families in Delaware pay less in state and local taxes](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/islF3LuNlbrHQDyIllXEaA==)** than any state but Alaska. With no sales tax and low property taxes, homeownership is more affordable.
* We continue to make investments where they matter most **\- in public education, in health care and** **[good-paying jobs](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/2HdaBVB7xu-n8w0dmg38BA==) for all working families. **
* And during this COVID crisis,**Delawareans have trusted the science, followed basic health precautions, and acted with a sense of community.** [_Learn more about new efforts announced by Governor Carney to support Delaware workers and small businesses affected by this pandemic._](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/Z7X2p1RsYbotLzN5TWKZIA==)

**SHARE THE TRUTH. **

**[Chip in >> Help us make sure we have leaders like Governor John Carney](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/M0rIR57704sxmbKiunfNeQ==?midqs=CAvTR7x0pJ1YRe1cGsoPRA==) who want to help strengthen the state's economy** rather than hinder it.

**Defend Delaware >>** **Share stories and articles that show the __real__ Delaware** \- and not some biased outsiders' perspective of it. Here are a few to consider:
* **INNOVATION: **Delaware jumps into the top 10 in tech rankings

[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/7TTR9ZD0oETKPkORiVS-Qw==?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.delawareonline.com%2Fstory%2Fmoney%2Fbusiness%2F2018%2F12%2F31%2Fdelaware-top-10-tech-rankings%2F2433582002%2F) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/C1roOhz2zViz-zeAZ2PW-Q==)
* **ENTREPRENEURSHIP:** UD Ranked a top school for budding entrepreneurs

[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/7TTR9ZD0oETKPkORiVS-Qw==?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.udel.edu%2Fudaily%2F2019%2Fnovember%2Fhorn-ranking-entrepreneur-princeton-review%2F%23%3A~%3Atext%3DUniversity%2520of%2520Delaware%27s%2520Horn%2520Entrepreneurship%2Cundergraduate%2520schools%2520for%2520entrepreneurial%2520studies.) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/k6HQcAajZJP2toDj-qE5mQ==)
* **SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY:** Report: Delaware ranks #7 in the U.S. for science and technology

[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/AfLBN8MfNSXNHqzeoeED8Q==?u=https://business.delaware.gov/2018/12/31/report-delaware-ranks-7-u-s-science-technology/) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/Drle3CIAIdAGW7G9epghxg==)

Thanks for your help.

\--Team Carney

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/4gpkcO-2HU5vn5tOy7DT1g==?midqs=CAvTR7x0pJ1YRe1cGsoPRA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/M0rIR57704sxmbKiunfNeQ==?midqs=CAvTR7x0pJ1YRe1cGsoPRA==)

FOLLOW & SHARE ON SOCIAL: **@johncarneyforde**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/5c-E6DkwHi3XTbkq8P-Q5w==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/xLzcWngo-KhXlwYu_63voA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ke2GodVyOi1xFK-YDRNLdA==/eABYTeoRa91f31UkLF_gkQ==)
