We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I hope this email finds you well and that you and your loved ones are having an excellent Labor Day Weekend. Team Hunt has spent the weekend reaching out to 7th District residents and spreading our message throughout our communities. Thank you to everyone who has devoted their time to helping us succeed. Early voting begins in just under 40 days, and thanks to the hard work of people like you, I believe we are in a better position than ever before to win in November.

On Monday, I formally challenged by opponent, Representative Lizzie Fletcher, to two public debates prior to Election Day. I think it is critical for voters to have the opportunity to hear their candidates openly discuss the issues most important to the 7th District. I hope Fletcher will accept my offer and join me on the debate stage. You can find my full statement [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=da2da6bbb28c47058a288e76e9ca5dba&_e=6HIvQ-NsvU5hd7pGh38iuRvbfeQhMTbSVCwBrOaAC7owhhwO54EZncbeLG8_Ra7mSi7hijrL0aw4C5_sqx2a8mOm2bpQfMNjYozAie-QjKP-q7ml6qPnn0ymZz1BfvSTG-Cw6uWLWWm9OXoyvkwzUCcHXymtjG8ek0xnODCyYHXHQ3ZLRChp3dCHrZXDfh0P7kUSKemfyvlVH3EYDOoFOSOr3CxGMH4ZSqU4dhq8ii8e3Z3JoWvPWhugNfC2yuwcmFLkwksxvmO1EAFZuGJgNUKiuTSS8w6Ia0ad5QCa_Zc%3D).

On Tuesday, I was humbled to receive Dr. Devinder Bhatia's support of my campaign in the 7th District. Dr. Bhatia is a member of the Team Hunt Medical Professionals Advisory Board and is committed to joining the conversation as we work with doctors and patients to improve our healthcare system. Thank you for joining Team Hunt, Dr. Bhatia, I look forward to working with you going forward.

On Wednesday, I re-affirmed my support for the Ike Dike project, an idea conceptualized at Texas A&M Galveston that will protect the Texas coast from dangerous storm surges. Hurricane Laura was a warning for Houston and we should take action now to ensure we are prepared for the next severe storm. Projects like the Ike Dike could protect millions of lives while preventing destructive flooding from wreaking havoc on the Houston Ship Channel. You can find my full statement supporting the Ike Dike concept [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=da2da6bbb28c47058a288e76e9ca5dba&_e=6HIvQ-NsvU5hd7pGh38iuRvbfeQhMTbSVCwBrOaAC7oDVpwrWKjw_HIIeijUNYMQjp2VeTSLr3ffWT6UkL7bp-Wmd4_IVqlPAcvJtFFeF6JqS867fMca6OU8f8ezDAocVd8zWEiUa7K7H26DlI7R8t4g3k_cghOEP4d9fB34MAur22he65WGWDCTMUzXxBjEHwQaVeODUt9KPo2qEiiJdlMTa2nMZDx01EDTWjFUT2Urpagvpg-LORPlf6_cYtCMvaeGbMdvLeEXMHjelcw3F_FXvGaDUZLsxmknsTJjivAEr5eYHyhGL7g-gOnkpjH7EhypsntYt21ejuaQKbxg8Q%3D%3D).

This morning, I joined Greg Groogan on _What's Your Point?_ to discuss my campaign to restore conservative leadership to Houston. The 7th District deserves a leader who will fight to bring Houston values to DC, not the other way around. As your next Congressman, I will ensure Houston as an advocate at the federal level.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=da2da6bbb28c47058a288e76e9ca5dba&_e=6HIvQ-NsvU5hd7pGh38iuUgpxFz8zDVM_msh7JmhsFPKd1pxSvvSzM2rtJLXIpr-ruhsnSTwZfuMBbHPc0h7PC92JtH7h6R8v4dUqdHOvpVK-QL2rbVihmyrcf8bRr0_Zo0qQKTgxsfLg5zTuBD_ZzADcP-458_bzoSpjmbpUmFHvD4uTVsEZKXPJx2m_5e9VEtZxBcYRDkg_7rSmGsEWcAwB8QOaG1ED5xlzNP_95t2Cj40vOtc6eQFXdSDlc5YpJV_omZfyIZ3z7D_vkoz0wmsR9FzY4kQcvjUqWNcaXeR_jhdo68HirvlDfxIgYuC)

Last weekend we reached our 10,000 yard sign goal! Thank you to everyone who has shown their support for our campaign by putting up a Hunt for Congress sign in their yard. If you would like a sign, please email info@wesleyfortexas.com and someone from Team Hunt will bring one to you as soon as possible.

_In case you missed it_ , last week I had a great conversation with ChrisX in which we delved into my Congressional race and issues important to the 7th District. In particular, we discussed the dangers of the Defund the Police movement and why we need leaders who will restore trust between our communities and law enforcement officers while also ensuring our officers are properly equipped to do their jobs.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=da2da6bbb28c47058a288e76e9ca5dba&_e=6HIvQ-NsvU5hd7pGh38iuUgpxFz8zDVM_msh7JmhsFPKd1pxSvvSzM2rtJLXIpr-ssJz4aI2fNFh1xObbUWYVrEc6CT5T0fwKjhlavS1Tny-OwhBpet255CcxpAnaZtX30UQ9ZTGTKP8-se7LTSUutJfImCTqgVAWZwsHk1LPLym6DuFyphOfwjmLDTa5SiV7W56a6V96RbSbcPEPbynfhpfU7kTWTjZG-kGSNGFlbwJivN1DcXE-xr_OsaV4qPZXdZ9N3V3IP6szE-zBmNUlckdseV0hYAFja4gyN7FEucLgO7JyZwQEm6lrgWcw5bX)

We are nearing the home stretch of the election cycle but there is still work to do. Team Hunt is working around the clock to ensure the 7th District gets the leadership it deserves and we couldn't do it without your support. Thank you for choosing to join us as we work to bring positive change to Houston.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=da2da6bbb28c47058a288e76e9ca5dba&_e=6HIvQ-NsvU5hd7pGh38iucqlr9rKyAQ7PihGqZ0Q6MIEPEYxXYI4IuBsJC0CZ7nnJPC-qiF-WgGxWsGWNWzmmtb3wByNj-AK2J30kK8nHPST3Crw46o4umCi-lfF6BjGGn-DuEUzYN0JFsMusVujrz6u8ieyqs04Mi-FqTzub9byJnLixtHS7kycJ5tusBWPgYiuIRb9lkZErjhuVRFwa0SWX3igbwjtvm6DgqTIWIps43vP9mPGoi7gtUkBu5PD3RVQtyCxIg3sCuI2gRj-p4zDtLh0zOtG6bXJoGzQPtw%3D)****
---

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=da2da6bbb28c47058a288e76e9ca5dba&_t=bsrumYO4FdkJ5OZXXYC_2iDKz5DM8N9m1zB_F5HwnH1uso5qQ4Qn4pstBAxwL5Es4hKyOpp7eUytbDTDD4ACwVXVkaRZhAwOcFmj5LwF_V9HhL50wRuCWtshEC6fLASAxnU16lYk4VtYLK6nKbTTQG8xANIJtoeh3AnuIY6QaRs%3D).

name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: important update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Like every other presidential election, 2020 is going to be won state-by-state. |
---
Peter,

From the outset of this campaign, we've told you that Donald Trump is going to be a difficult opponent to beat.

And we've never tried to shield this team from a challenge because we know in the face of uncertainty, our grassroots supporters have always risen to the occasion.

**That 's why we're directly sending you this tight battleground states poll from CNN, and **[asking for $25 to our Battleground States Fund to grow this narrow lead:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.01_B4_battleground_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.01_B4_battleground_X__F1_S2_C1__nonopeners_RS") **CNN POLL -- BATTLEGROUND STATES**
Joe Biden -- 49%
Donald Trump -- 48% Remember, Peter, the last two Republicans to win the presidency entered the White House without winning the popular vote: George W. Bush and Donald Trump.

Like every other presidential election, 2020 is going to be won state-by-state. And we should prepare for a competitive Electoral College result.

That's why raising into our Battleground States Fund is so important, and as a resident of Pennsylvania, your own backyard is an Electoral College battleground and a critical part of our path to 270 electoral votes! Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045cd/1970773900/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045cc/1970773900/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045cb/1970773900/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045ca/1970773900/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045c9/1970773900/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045c8/1970773900/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045cb/1970773900/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045c7/1970773900/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045ca/1970773900/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b208/1cd0ac28/15c1cb251/357045c6/1970773900/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
